title: HUP iEEG Epilepsy Dataset
description: A de-identified intracranial EEG dataset from 58 patients with drug-resistant epilepsy who underwent surgical treatment at the Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania. The dataset includes electrophysiologic recordings from subdural grids, strips, depth electrodes (ECoG), and stereotactically-placed depth electrodes (SEEG), with both interictal and ictal periods represented. Electrode localizations in ICBM152 MNI space, clinically-determined seizure onset zones, and resection/ablation cavity segmentations are provided to support epilepsy research and surgical outcome prediction.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG data were collected from patients undergoing surgical treatment for drug-resistant epilepsy using subdural grid, strip, and depth electrodes (ECoG) or stereotactically-placed depth electrodes (SEEG). Electrode localizations were registered to ICBM152 MNI space. Resection or ablation zones were rigorously determined by segmenting the resection cavity. Data were converted to BIDS format using MNE-BIDS.
